holdings.infoBox: SLVR is an equity ETF with a total of 71 individual holdings. The top holdings are First Majestic Silver stock at 24.68%, Sprott Physical Silver Trust at 17.41%, Silvercorp Metals at 6.12%, AbraSilver Resource at 6.01%, and Aya Gold & Silver at 5.97%.

overview.description: The Sprott Silver Miners & Physical Silver ETF (SLVR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq Sprott Silver Miners index. The fund tracks an index of 30-50 companies involved in silver mining providing exposure to the silver market through investments in securities related to silver activities. The fund also holds, to a lesser extent, silver trusts providing exposure to physical silver SLVR was launched on Jan 14, 2025 and is issued by Sprott.
